urdu transliteration text:
NA AB HUSSAIN NA LASHKAR HUSSAIN KA HOGA
SITAM UTHAANE KO BIMAAR E KARBALA HOGA
english translation text:
No longer will Hussain and His Army be there (to protect women and children)
Alone will be Sajjad (Bemaar-e- Karbala) to bear all the Pain

urdu transliteration text:
PATAKTI HONGI SAR APNA FURAT KI MAUJE
DHUAN JALE HUWE KHAIMON SE UTHH RAHA HOGA
Camps must be on Fire now, spreading smoke all around
english translation text: Waves of river Furat must be repentant now (to have not aided the Holy Family)

urdu transliteration text: NA AB HUSSAIN NA LASHKAR HUSSAIN KA HOGA
english translation text: No longer will Hussain and His Army be there (to protect women and children)

urdu transliteration text:
ZAMINE GARM PE TASHNA DAHAN PADE HONGE
SARON PE AB KOI SAAYAA NA REH GAYA HOGA
english translation text:
Thirst stricken Holy Family (of AhlulBayt) now lays on hottest of grounds
No Shelter (No Support), nothing of comfort can be found anymore

urdu transliteration text: NA AB HUSSAIN NA LASHKAR HUSSAIN KA HOGA
english translation text: No longer will Hussain and His Army be there (to protect women and children)

urdu transliteration text:
KISI NE BAALIYAAN KAANON KI CHHINLI HONGI
KOI TAMAACHE SAKINA KO MAARTA HOGA
english translation text:
Sakina bleeds now with her earrings snatched (by the enemy)
And she bears the pain of getting smacked (by the enemy)

urdu transliteration text: NA AB HUSSAIN NA LASHKAR HUSSAIN KA HOGA
english translation text: No longer will Hussain and His Army be there (to protect women and children)

urdu transliteration text:
ASIR HOKE NABI ZAADIYAAN CHALI HONGI
TO DIL KA HAAL KHUDA JAANE KYA HUWA HOGA
english translation text:
Distressed and detained, daughters of Prophet (s.a.w) travelled (to Shaam)
Only God knows how they survived (the utter pain)

urdu transliteration text: NA AB HUSSAIN NA LASHKAR HUSSAIN KA HOGA
english translation text: No longer will Hussain and His Army be there (to protect women and children)

urdu transliteration text:
LAHU SHAHIDON KA DEKHA JO HOGA ZAINAB NE
Watching the bloodshed of martyrs all around
TO DIL SE PYAAS KA EHSAS MIT GAYA HOGA
english translation text: Zainab would have forgotten her thirst

urdu transliteration text: NA AB HUSSAIN NA LASHKAR HUSSAIN KA HOGA
english translation text: No longer will Hussain and His Army be there (to protect women and children)

urdu transliteration text:
PADE HAI LAASH KE TUKDE KATE HAI BAAZU BHI
MAGAR SAKINANE PEHCHAAN TO LIYA HOGA
english translation text:
The Body has been scattered & slashed and arms have been severed
But Sakina would have surely recognized (her uncle Abbas)

urdu transliteration text: NA AB HUSSAIN NA LASHKAR HUSSAIN KA HOGA
english translation text: No longer will Hussain and His Army be there (to protect women and children)

urdu transliteration text:
ABHI NASIB MEN DURRE HAI AUR TAMAACHEN HAI
ABHI SAKINA KO PAANI KAHAAN MILAA HOGA
english translation text:
Beating and whipping is all that is left in (Sakina’s) fate
Her thirst has yet to be quenched

urdu transliteration text: NA AB HUSSAIN NA LASHKAR HUSSAIN KA HOGA
english translation text: No longer will Hussain and His Army be there (to protect women and children)

urdu transliteration text:
TUMHAARI PYAAS TO NAAWAKSE BUJGAYI ASGHAR
DILE RABAB MAGAR GHAM SE HUK RAHA HOGA
english translation text:
A Sharp arrow has put an end to your thirst, O Asghar!
Rubab’s heart (Asghar’s mother) must be sinking, God knows better!

urdu transliteration text: NA AB HUSSAIN NA LASHKAR HUSSAIN KA HOGA
english translation text: No longer will Hussain and His Army be there (to protect women and children)

urdu transliteration text:
ABHI SUKUN MUNAWWAR KAHAAN YATIMON KO
ABHI TO QAIDE MUSIBAT KA SAAMNA HOGA
english translation text:
It’s not an end to the pain of the Masooms just yet
As more distress and captivity awaits them

urdu transliteration text: NA AB HUSSAIN NA LASHKAR HUSSAIN KA HOGA
english translation text: No longer will Hussain and His Army be there (to protect women and children)
